overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking through a medieval European-style town. The character navigates cobblestone streets, passes through stone archways, explores a stable courtyard, and walks past timber-framed houses with blooming gardens in a bustling historic settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley opening to market street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow passage between timber houses toward the stone gatehouse ahead

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress walking toward the camera

entered.detail: half-timbered medieval house with wattle and daub walls
half-timbered building with dark wooden beams
large stone building with external staircase and arched passage
wooden market stall with canvas awning on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow cobblestone alley between timber-framed houses, emerging onto a wider street. A stone gatehouse with an external staircase dominates the view ahead, while a wooden market stall appears on the right. The morning sun casts shadows across the mossy cobblestones.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone gatehouse passage with market activity

events.description: passing through the stone archway into the inner courtyard area
character slows and turns around to head back toward the archway

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone archway into a crowded courtyard, then turning around to exit

notable_agents.action: man carrying wooden planks on his shoulder

entered.detail: construction scaffolding made of rough wooden timbers
open courtyard space visible through the archway

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches and passes through the stone gatehouse archway into a busier courtyard area. The lighting becomes diffused under the arch, and more NPCs are visible. Wooden scaffolding appears on the right. After entering, the character turns around to head back through the archway.

events.description: entering the stable courtyard with the white horse visible

agents.ego_description: turning back through the archway and entering a courtyard area with a stable building

notable_agents.action: man in green shirt walking alongside carrying goods

entered.detail: wooden stable structure with open front and hay on the ground
white horse standing in the stable entrance
rough wooden picket fence lining the path

segments.scene_description: After turning back, Geralt exits the archway and enters a courtyard area featuring a wooden stable. A white horse stands in the stable entrance on the right, while a wooden fence lines the left side of the path. The stone gatehouse remains visible behind as the character moves toward the stable.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered passage between buildings with inn entrance

events.description: passing through the vine-covered archway into a sunlit street

agents.ego_description: walking past the stable and through a covered passage with hanging vegetation

notable_agents.action: drunken man leaning over a wooden table

entered.detail: stone archway covered with hanging vines and vegetation
timber-framed building with warm interior light suggesting a tavern
green vines hanging down from the passage roof

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks past the stable and enters a covered stone passage adorned with hanging vines. An inn or tavern building is visible on the left with warm light spilling from its entrance. The passage creates a sheltered, enclosed feeling before opening up again.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with timber houses and gardens

agents.ego_description: walking along the village street past timber houses with blooming flower gardens

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress tending to flowers near a fence

entered.detail: garden with blooming yellow and red flowers along a wooden fence
stacked wooden barrels outside a building
wooden cart with wheels parked on the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered passage, Geralt walks along a sunlit residential street lined with timber-framed houses. Flower gardens with blooming plants line the left side behind wooden fences, while barrels and carts are visible on the right. The street continues through the historic village with scattered pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval town, transitioning from narrow, shadowed alleys into a sunlit residential district. It begins with Geralt walking along mossy cobblestones between timber-framed houses before emerging onto a wider street dominated by a stone gatehouse. As the camera passes through the diffused light of the gatehouse archway into a bustling courtyard, the character turns back to enter a stable area where a white horse stands beside a wooden fence. The scene then shifts into a sheltered stone passage adorned with hanging vines and the warm glow of a nearby tavern, creating a brief sense of enclosure. Finally, the camera emerges from the passage onto a bright residential street lined with blooming flower gardens and wooden fences under the clear morning sun.
